_comment: Phase 4.5 — CloudWatch Logs metric-filter patterns over CloudTrail JSON events. These are the canonical CIS AWS Foundations monitoring controls. Each pattern, when it matches a log event, increments a CloudWatch custom metric (metricValue 1) that an alarm watches with threshold >= 1. Used by scripts/phase-4/setup_cw_metric_alarms.py.

filters.name: RootAccountUsage
filters.comment: CIS 1.x — alert on any use of the root account by a human (excludes AWS-service-initiated events).

filters.name: IAMPolicyChanges
filters.comment: CIS — alert on IAM policy create/attach/detach/delete/put changes.
filters.pattern: { ($.eventName = DeleteGroupPolicy) || ($.eventName = DeleteRolePolicy) || ($.eventName = DeleteUserPolicy) || ($.eventName = PutGroupPolicy) || ($.eventName = PutRolePolicy) || ($.eventName = PutUserPolicy) || ($.eventName = CreatePolicy) || ($.eventName = DeletePolicy) || ($.eventName = CreatePolicyVersion) || ($.eventName = DeletePolicyVersion) || ($.eventName = AttachRolePolicy) || ($.eventName = DetachRolePolicy) || ($.eventName = AttachUserPolicy) || ($.eventName = DetachUserPolicy) || ($.eventName = AttachGroupPolicy) || ($.eventName = DetachGroupPolicy) }
